name: GPTQ Hessian Int6
author: arnavgarg
description: Replace GPTQ-lite clip-percentile quantizer with full Hessian-based GPTQ (Frantar et al., 2022) for int6 weight matrices. Calibration Hessians collected from 65k training tokens post-training. All other settings identical to SOTA PR #549 stack.
notes: 3-seed mean on 8xH100 SXM. TTT_ENABLED was not set; final metric is final_int6_roundtrip_exact. Non-record submission — GPTQ Hessian quantization proof-of-concept.
